text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services * Older Adults 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Domestic Violence Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Human Trafficking Issues Older Adults Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home delivered meals, naturalization assistance, homebound assistance, limited transportation assistance, case management, health and wellness activities, and focal point leadership for older adults and their caregivers. An Information and Assistance specialist is available to provide information and referrals. 10301 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Age 60 and older. Some services have income eligibility criteria.
